last_completed_round.direction_name: Rebalance the warp tile split to recover active warps
last_completed_round.hypothesis: The new 2-warp CTA improved runtime by cutting barrier stalls from 21.86% to 8.89% and raising tensor activity from 13.64% to 15.07%, but it also doubled the register occupancy limit from 12 to 24 and dropped active warps to 45.70%. Retuning the CTA and warp tile split so each warp holds less output state while keeping some of the new per-warp reuse should recover latency hiding without fully giving back the reuse win.
